mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_DOC_RCV_URL SET STATUS = 'E' , AMD_ID = 'BATCH' , AMD_DT = TO_DATE(#{batchExeDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') WHERE STATUS != 'E' AND EXPIRE_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{batchExeDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1 AND TO_DATE(#{batchExeDate}, 'YYYYMMDD')
mapper.select: SELECT DOC_RCV_ID FROM ( SELECT DOC_RCV_ID , STATUS , AMD_DT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY DOC_RCV_ID ORDER BY ISSUE_DT DESC) AS RN FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_URL ) WHERE RN = 1 AND STATUS = 'E' AND AMD_DT >= TO_DATE(#{batchExeDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1
mapper.update:
INSERT INTO NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS ( DOC_RCV_ID, DOC_SEQ, RCV_YN, RCV_DT, PROC_STATUS, PROC_DT, CRET_ID, CRET_DT ) SELECT STT.DOC_RCV_ID , MSTT.DOC_SEQ + 1 , STT.RCV_YN , STT.RCV_DT , 'E' , SYSDATE , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS STT , ( SELECT DOC_RCV_ID , MAX(DOC_SEQ) AS DOC_SEQ FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS GROUP BY DOC_RCV_ID ) MSTT WHERE STT.DOC_RCV_ID = MSTT.DOC_RCV_ID AND STT.DOC_SEQ = MSTT.DOC_SEQ AND STT.PROC_STATUS = 'N' AND STT.DOC_RCV_ID IN
#{docRcvId}

INSERT INTO NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS ( DOC_RCV_ID, DOC_SEQ, RCV_YN, RCV_DT, PROC_STATUS, PROC_DT, CRET_ID, CRET_DT ) SELECT STT.DOC_RCV_ID , MSTT.DOC_SEQ + 1 , STT.RCV_YN , STT.RCV_DT , 'I' , SYSDATE , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS STT , ( SELECT DOC_RCV_ID , MAX(DOC_SEQ) AS DOC_SEQ FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS GROUP BY DOC_RCV_ID ) MSTT WHERE STT.DOC_RCV_ID = MSTT.DOC_RCV_ID AND STT.DOC_SEQ = MSTT.DOC_SEQ AND STT.PROC_STATUS = 'R' AND STT.DOC_RCV_ID IN
#{docRcvId}
